data.html:
Come Miasma or Chasm, you do not face the great rift alone.

The past is close but our journey stretches on. On Talos-II, we venture forth as one.

Dear Endministrator,

Welcome to Core Chapter Version [Homecoming]!

▼// Maintenance Update & Compensation Details

■ Update & Maintenance Time

Asia Server: July 16, 2026 at 06:00 – July 16, 2026 at 12:00 (UTC+8)

Americas / Europe Server: July 15, 2026 at 17:00 – July 15, 2026 at 23:00 (UTC-5)

※ The server reopening time after maintenance may be earlier or later than scheduled. Please check the official announcement for details.

■ Maintenance Update & Bug Fix Compensation Details

· Update & Maintenance Compensation: [Oroberyl]×900

· Bug Fix Compensation: [Oroberyl]×900

· Distribution Period: After the update and maintenance – Before the next version update and maintenance

· Eligibility: Create a character before the update

· Note: Update & Maintenance Compensation and Bug Fix Compensation will be sent separately via in-game mail. The mails will expire at the start of the next version update and maintenance, so please claim them in time.

■ Update Notes

This update is mandatory. After the update is complete, you will need to re-download and reinstall the game client. Once the version update and maintenance begin, you can follow the in-game instructions to proceed with the update.

· iOS: Enter the App Store and tap [Update].

· Android: Enter the game and follow the pop-up prompts to complete the update.

· PlayStation®5: Go to the home screen, select [Arknights: Endfield], press the controller's [OPTIONS] button, select [Check for Update], and confirm the update.

· PC: After closing the game, restart the GRYPHLINK launcher and click [Update].

※ After [Homecoming] version update, some content will unlock gradually over time as your exploration progresses. Please refer to the in-game version for the actual update details.

▼// New Version Content

■ New Stories

1. Main Missions

Available up to [Chapter Ⅱ Process Ⅶ: Stubbornly Lingers the Setting Sun].

2. Exploration Missions

[OD Project: Cardiac Remediation Station III], [Outpost: Cloudseeder STN], [OD Project: Cloudseeder STN I], [OD Project: Cloudseeder STN II], [Fissure Filling and Land Grouting], [Echoes of War], [Blightshade Watch], [Treasures of the Past]

3. Side Missions

[Like a Star Streaking Through the Boundaries], [Spotlight of the Morning Star], [Long Night Breaking into Day], [Sorrow Sings in Silence], [Nameless Blades I], [Nameless Blades II], [Nameless Blades III], [Home Beyond Reach]

■ New Operators

6★ operators [Arcane], [Liino]

■ New Weapons

6★ weapons [Type 42: Solemn Phalanx (Arts Unit)], [Bedazzling Night Debut (Polearm)], [Farsight (Sword)], [Junction Point (Arts Unit)], [Golden Age (Polearm)]

■ New Enemies

[Tuskbeast Blightshade], [Quillbeast Blightshade], [Rakerbeast Blightshade], [Blitzcrash Blightshade], [YSTF Vanguard Blightshade], [YSTF Elite Blightshade], [YSTF Glaiver Blightshade], [YSTF Captain Blightshade], [Alleikhreos, Chiliarch]

■ New Area

[Wuling - Yinglung Pass], [Wuling - North Wuling Exclusion Zone]

■ New Headhunting Events and Issues

1. [North Yearns the Rift Vigile] Chartered Headhunting

· Availability: After [Homecoming] version update – Aug. 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)

· Headhunting Details: [North Yearns the Rift Vigile] Chartered Headhunting features the Rate-UP 6★ operator [Arcane]. 6★ operators that may appear include: Arcane / Camille / Mi Fu / Ember / Lifeng / Ardelia / Last Rite / Pogranichnik.

· During the Chartered Headhunting, [Combat Drills] will also become available for trying out the 6★ operator [Arcane]. Complete the specified stage with the preset team that includes the trial operator and go to the [Event Center] screen to claim the rewards. You can also exchange for [Gaze North to the Rift HH Permit] at a discount in [AIC Quota Exchange]. Up to [Gaze North to the Rift HH Permit]×5 can be exchanged.

2. [Military Grade Issue] Open

· Availability: Opens after [Homecoming] version update; ends after 3 [Chartered Headhunting] banners (starting from [North Yearns the Rift Vigile])

· Issue Details: [Military Grade Issue] features the Rate-UP 6★ weapon [Type 42: Solemn Phalanx (Arts Unit)]. 6★ weapons that may appear include: Type 42: Solemn Phalanx (Arts Unit) / Former Finery (Greatsword) / Wedge (Handcannon) / Eminent Repute (Sword) / JET (Polearm) / Detonation Unit (Arts Unit) / Oblivion (Arts Unit).

3. [Good Morning from Your Dawnstar] Chartered Headhunting

· Availability: Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time) – Before version update and maintenance

· Headhunting Details: [Good Morning from Your Dawnstar] Chartered Headhunting features the Rate-UP 6★ operator [Liino]. 6★ operators that may appear include: Liino / Arcane / Camille / Ember / Lifeng / Ardelia / Last Rite / Pogranichnik.

· During the Chartered Headhunting, [Combat Drills] will also become available for trying out the 6★ operator [Liino]. Complete the specified stage with the preset team that includes the trial operator and go to the [Event Center] screen to claim the rewards. You can also exchange for [Bedazzling Dawnstar HH Permit] at a discount in [AIC Quota Exchange]. Up to [Bedazzling Dawnstar HH Permit]×5 can be exchanged.

4. [Bedazzled Issue] Open

· Availability: Opens Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time); ends after 3 [Chartered Headhunting] banners (starting from [Good Morning from Your Dawnstar])

· Issue Details: [Bedazzled Issue] features the Rate-UP 6★ weapon [Bedazzling Night Debut (Polearm)]. 6★ weapons that may appear include: Bedazzling Night Debut (Polearm) / Sundered Prince (Greatsword) / Clannibal (Handcannon) / Valiant (Polearm) / JET (Polearm) / Detonation Unit (Arts Unit) / Thermite Cutter (Sword).

※ For more headhunting and issue details, please check in-game.

■ New Events

1. [Tribute of Companionship] Celebration Event

· Event Time: After [Homecoming] version update – Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time)

· Event Details: Sign in for 3 days in total to earn rich rewards, including [Oroberyl]×3000, [Basic HH Permit]×5, and 6★ weapon [Farsight (Sword)].

2. [Fortune Connect-and-Win] Celebration Event

· Event Time: After [Homecoming] version update – July 31, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

· Event Details:

○ During the event, perform 1 scratch at the event screen every day to earn different rewards based on the revealed stamp. You can participate up to 14 times, and each scratch grants [Oroberyls] and various progression materials.

○ A "Daily Stamp" will be announced every day during the event. If a stamp that matches the "Daily Stamp" is revealed, the rewards for that stamp will be doubled, and rewards for the other stamps can also be obtained. If the "ALL" stamp is revealed, then the "ALL" prize will be granted.

○ During the event, you may claim up to 4 "ALL" prizes. After 14 scratches, you are guaranteed to earn at least [Oroberyl]×5000.

3. [Main Mission Early Unlock: Wuling] Permanent Activity

· Event Time: Permanently available after [Homecoming] version update

· Event Details: Once you complete the main mission [Chapter Ⅰ Process Ⅱ: Remediation Progress], you will be able to unlock and accept the main mission [Chapter Ⅱ Process Ⅰ: Arrival at Wuling] in advance via the [Event Center] screen and head to the Wuling region. This activity will not affect the progression of Chapter Ⅰ main missions. You may return to Valley IV at any time to continue playing Chapter I content. Main missions from different chapters can be active at the same time.

4. [Gaze Towards the Northern Exclusion] Guide Event

· Event Time: After [Homecoming] version update – Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time)

· Event Details: Complete specified missions in the [Yinglung Pass] and [North Wuling Exclusion Zone] areas of the [Wuling] region to claim [Oroberyl]×1200 and [Mark of Perseverance] rewards.

5. [Gaze North to the Rift] Sign-In Event

· Event Time: After [Homecoming] version update – Aug. 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)

· Event Details: Sign in for a total of 7 days to earn rewards such as [Gaze North to the Rift HH Permit]×5.

6. [Like a Star Streaking Through the Boundaries] Narrative Event

· Event Time: Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time) – Before version update and maintenance

· Event Details: Complete the side mission [Like a Star Streaking Through the Boundaries] to acquire [Oroberyl]×600, [Elementary Cognitive Carrier], and other rewards.

7. [Bedazzling Dawnstar] Sign-In Event

· Event Time: Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time) – Before version update and maintenance

· Event Details: Sign in for a total of 7 days to earn rewards such as [Bedazzling Dawnstar HH Permit]×5.

8. [HEAT RAGE! MEGA ARENA!] Challenge Event

· Event Time: July 30, 2026 at 12:00 – Aug. 13, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

· Event Details: During the event, complete a series of challenge stages to claim rewards such as [Oroberyl]×1200, [Portrait Frame: Heat Ragers' Party], and [Mark of Perseverance].

9. [Sanity Supply] Limited-Time Event

· Event Time:

Asia Server:

Aug. 2, 2026 at 04:00 – Aug. 9, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

Aug. 26, 2026 at 04:00 – Sept. 2, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

Americas / Europe Server:

Aug. 2, 2026 at 04:00 – Aug. 9, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

Aug. 26, 2026 at 04:00 – Sept. 1, 2026 at 17:00 (server time)

· Event Details: During the event, complete specified missions every day to claim Sanity Supply rewards: [Sanity Usage Permit] and [Emergency Sanity Booster].

10. [The Rooted Realm] Fun & Games Event

· Event Time: Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time) – Before version update and maintenance

· Event Details: Collect Aurylene Fragments and complete Realm Quests in [The Rooted Realm] to claim rewards including [Oroberyl]×1600 and [Mark of Perseverance].

■ Event & Gameplay Updates

1. [Echoes of War] Permanent Challenge Mode

· Availability: Permanently available after [Homecoming] version update

· Gameplay Details: [Echoes of War] is a seasonal game mode that is permanently available. Challenge various stages, earn stars, and achieve various season titles. [Echoes of War] will be updated with new stages from time to time. Clear a stage on Normal difficulty for the first time to claim [Oroberyls]. Clearing stages on higher difficulties will also grant rewards such as [Mark of Perseverance] and [Advanced Cognitive Carrier].

○ [Season of Recalling]

· Season Update: After [Homecoming] version update – Aug. 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)

· Update Notes: New season [Season of Recalling] is available. This season features 6 stages in total across 3 cycles. Each cycle includes 3 stages. Clearing all stages on Normal difficulty in [Season of Recalling] will grant rewards including [Oroberyl]×600.

○ [Season of Delirating]

· Season Update: Aug. 9, 2026 at 12:00 (server time) – Before version update and maintenance

· Update Notes: New season [Season of Delirating] is available. This season features 2 new stages across 3 cycles. Each cycle includes 3 stages. Clearing all new stages on Normal difficulty in [Season of Delirating] will grant [Oroberyl]×200.

2. [Umbral Monument] Challenge Gameplay Updated, [Howlers of the Crag] Stages Available

· Availability: Aug. 6, 2026 at 12:00 (server time)

· Update Details: This [Umbral Monument] challenge mode introduces a new series, [Howlers of the Crag], featuring 4 stages. Complete all stage challenges to earn rewards that include: [Mark of Perseverance], [Advanced Cognitive Carrier], [Arms INSP Set], and [Protohedron].

[Monumental Etching: Beastly Howl] limited-time challenge event will also be available once the gameplay mode is updated.

· Event Time: Aug. 6, 2026 at 12:00 – Aug. 20, 2026 at 04:00 (server time)

· Event Details: Upon the release of the [Howlers of the Crag] series, the [Monumental Etching: Beastly Howl] limited-time event will begin. During the event, complete various [Umbral Monument] challenges to claim rewards including [Oroberyl]×1200 and [Advanced Progression Selection Crate I].

3. [Delver of the Cryptic] Spatial Set Update

· Update Time: Aug. 19, 2026 at 12:00 (server time)

· Update Notes: This [Delver of the Cryptic] puzzle-solving event will introduce the new spatial set [Artful Realm of Six Cardinals]. 3 new Protocol Spaces will be available initially, with 3 more available on Aug. 26, 2026 at 04:00 (server time). Complete the spatial set challenges to claim rewards including [Oroberyl]×1200, and [Mark of Perseverance].

※ For more event and gameplay info, stay tuned for our official announcements.

■ Acquisition Center Update

· [Protocol Pass: Blighted Sea] is available. During the [Homecoming] version period, you can acquire various support items listed by the Arsenal Engineers in the [Protocol Pass]. Activating each seasonal Protocol Pass unlocks the [Basic Supply] tier by default. Level up the Pass to earn rewards such as [Basic HH Permit], [Oroberyls], [Exchange Crate-o-Surprise], and [Progression Materials].

· Added in [Acquisition Center - Bundles]: [Homecoming Curios Collection Pack], [Companionship Celebration Bundle], [ID Info Update Pack], [Protocol Flow Bundle], [Rift Vigile HH Bundle] and [Dawnstar HH Bundle]. The purchase limit for [Value Arsenal Ticket Pack] is reset.

※ For more bundles and their details, visit the in-game [Acquisition Center - Bundles].

■ Combat System

· Added teammate skill visual effect settings, allowing you to customize the quality and opacity of your teammates' skill effects.

· Added more detailed enemy targeting priority settings, allowing you to separately adjust Skill Attack Targeting Priority, Active Target Lock-on, and Assisted Target Selection.

■ AIC Factory

· Increased the Regional Development Level cap for [Wuling]. Added new outpost [Xiranflow Cloudseeder Station] to [Wuling - Yinglung Pass]. Increased the Environment Monitoring level cap in [Wuling - Marker Stone], and increased the level cap of the [Cardiac Remediation Station] outpost. Increased the Depot Node level cap in [Wuling - Test Area]. Added new exchangeable goods to [Wuling Stock Redistribution].

· Added gas-related AIC Mode to Wuling AIC, along with gas-related AIC Plans: [Gas Extraction], [Flow Rate Adjustment], [Gas Reactor Globe], [Gas Dispersal], [Gas Reaction], [Gas Purification], [Fluid-Gas Transmutation], [Solid-Gas Transmutation], [Gas Storage], [Gas Filling & Separation]. Also added the corresponding AIC facilities, simulations, and system blueprints.

· Added remote stashing of facilities in the wild: AIC facilities placed outside the Automation-Core areas can all be directly stashed to the regional depot via the [Stash] button on the map.

· Added gatherable resources [Inergen] and [Xiragen]. Related vents will gradually become available in the [Wuling] region as main missions progress.

· Added a rare plant gathering site in the [Wuling - Wuling City] area.

■ System

· New [Talosite Exchange] Feature: You can now gather special energy crystals known as Talosites in [Wuling - Yinglung Pass] and [Wuling - North Wuling Exclusion Zone], then exchange them in [Talosite Exchange] for rewards such as [Gear Templates], [Ornamentals], [Camera Poses], and [Vinyls].

· Added the [Aero-Salvaging] game mode, allowing you to complete aero-salvaging challenges in [Wuling - Yinglung Pass] and [Wuling - North Wuling Exclusion Zone].

· New [Transmute] Feature: After progressing to [Chapter Ⅱ Process Ⅰ: Arrival at Wuling], you will be able to use this feature in the [Crafting] screen to transmute certain high-tier materials into lower-tier ones. Consuming Sanity can further increase the transmutation yield.

· New [Birthday] Feature: After setting your birthday information, you will receive a special greeting on your birthday. When setting your birthday for the first time, if the birthday for the current year has already passed, this year's birthday mail will be sent retroactively. You may also freely choose whether to publicly display your birthday on your profile page.

· New [ID Info Update Card]: You can change your name upon using this item. One [ID Info Update Card] will be available for free every six months. If additional cards are needed, they can also be purchased directly.

· Added [Arsenal Defense Crate] to operator trial event rewards. [Arsenal Defense Crate] contains a special set of Fully Artificed Level 60 gear well-suited for the current trial operator. Once your game progress reaches the [Wuling] region, all corresponding [Gear Templates] for this gear set will be unlocked automatically.

· New Operator Artwork Viewing Feature: You can now switch to view the 2D artwork of owned operators from the [Operators] display screen.

· Added the [Phonograph MKV-I] to the [Reception Room] of [OMV Dijiang].

· Added an [Unstuck] prompt for situations where your character becomes stuck unexpectedly.

■ Others

· Added content such as [Operator Guide], [Camera Pose], [Energy Alluvium], [Crisis Fragment], [NPC], [Engraved Medal], [Profile Theme], [Portrait], [Portrait Frame], [Filter], [Sticker], [Consumable], [Material], [Sanity Meds], [Database Entry], [Clue Dossier], [Ornamental], [Vinyl], and [Regional Aurylene Submission Phase]. They will gradually be unlocked as you progress further.

· Added Gear Sets [AIC Fieldwork] and [Rift Trekker]. Added new gear pieces to Gear Sets [Hot Work], [Eternal Xiranite], and [LYNX].

· Added the operator promotion material [Talos Cap], operator skill mastery material [Crimson Spearleaf], and weapon tuning material [Protocolith].

· Added showcase animations for weapons obtained from certain sources.

· Added a zoom feature to the [Database - Item Files - Production Chain] screen, as well as a [Files] button on the weapon details screen in [Database - Weapon Files].

▼// Optimizations & Adjustments

■ Missions

· Optimized the model appearance of some NPCs that appear after completing the side mission [OD Project: Infra-Station III].

■ Combat

· Optimized how a teammate avoids getting in the controlled operator's way when both are melee operators.

· Optimized teammates' auto-follow behavior.

· Optimized the behavior and visual effects of warning circles displayed when enemies cast skills.

· Optimized the visual indicator for the Slow effect applied by the enemy [Craghowler].

· Optimized the sound effects for the 6★ operator [Mi Fu]'s combo skills.

■ AIC Factory

· Content Balancing Optimization in [Wuling]: For early access to Wuling, the relevant systems and stats will be adjusted accordingly to ensure a smooth exploration, combat, and progression experience. Most enemies in [Wuling] will scale with your Exploration Level. Upon entering [Wuling] and placing the Protocol Automation-Core, a batch of AIC facilities will be unlocked and provided in advance, letting you construct and use them early in [Wuling] to set up production lines. These facilities are not yet usable in Valley IV, and can only be used there after you research the corresponding AIC technologies in the Basic AIC Plan.

· Conduit Connection Optimization: The connection distance for conduits is now calculated based on straight-line distance, with the upper limit increased from 200 meters to 300 meters. If teleportation would break the conduit connection, a confirmation prompt will appear. When saving blueprints that contain conduits, their connection states will now be saved along with the blueprint. When both the connected conduit inlet and outlet are selected and moved, copied, or saved as a blueprint in bulk, the connection state will be preserved.

· Top View Mode Control Optimization: When selecting from multiple overlapping targets in top view mode, an option list will now pop up displaying the overlapping facilities for you to choose from.

· Facility Placement Optimization: When placing facilities with switchable modes, you can now select the desired mode before placement.

· Optimized the AIC Factory Plan display: When the unlock conditions for an AIC technology include a prerequisite mission, a jump button for the corresponding mission will now be displayed next to the Research Criteria.

· Optimized the visual presentation of liquids in pipes: When certain types of liquid enter a pipe, an animation will play showing the liquid flowing toward the endpoint.

· Expanded Advanced Gear Assembly Techniques: Gold-quality gear now supports switching between different assembly techniques. In addition to the default technique, each piece of gear can be crafted using other compatible techniques. Newly added assembly techniques are backward-compatible with older ones. When using the latest technique, stock bill consumption enjoys a substantial 99% discount. You can preview compatibility details for all techniques in [Gear Assembly - Switch All Techniques], bulk change assembly techniques for all eligible gear, or customize techniques for individual pieces of gear.

· Improved the interaction and usability of shared ziplines. After using another player's shared zipline, it will automatically be maintained.

■ System

· Adjusted certain missions in the [Beginner's Chartered Tribute] permanent activity.

· Adjusted some of the content displayed in [New Horizons Giveaway EXPO Panel].

· Camera System Optimization: When taking photos, you can now freely move the operators in the current team, adjust their positions and orientations, and switch between auto focus and manual focus. The camera system now also includes a variety of selectable poses. A range of new stickers have also been added for you to get creative with your photos.

· Ornamental System Optimization: A dedicated management screen has been added for Ornamentals. Ornamentals will no longer occupy Backpack or Depot capacity. The Quick Stash feature will now support one-click stashing of all placed Ornamentals of the selected type in the current region.

· Optimized some text descriptions in [Headhunting Details] for [Chartered Headhunting] and [Issue Details] for [Arsenal Issue]. Following this version update, [Headhunting Records] will retain [Chartered Headhunting] reward records for 90 days, while [Issue Records] will retain Arsenal Issue reward records for the same period.

· Missions and Tag Tracking Optimization: After clicking [Track] in the [Mission] screen, if the next step is to view a message, it will take you directly to the corresponding [Baker] screen. If the next step is to go to a specific location, it will open the map and highlight the target location. Additionally, a [Teleport] button has been added to the map tag details page, allowing you to automatically select the nearest TP Point to the target location.

· Optimized the display logic for marker entries in Map [Marker Tags].

· Optimized how mission tracking updates.

· Optimized the sorting rules on the Mission screen. Missions with tags are now displayed in the following priority order: [New Feature > New Area > Key Story > Timed].

· Optimized the information display on the Incident Investigation screen by adding investigation area prompts and comment sources.

· Optimized the story dialogue experience by adding definitions for key terms in dialogues.

· Optimized the default selection logic for the controlled operator of the current team after entering and exiting [Protocol Space].

· Optimized the design of the reward selection button in [Protocol Spaces] with selectable rewards sets, making it easier to identify and use. Also adjusted the default reward display order for Level 5 of [Protocol Spaces] with selectable rewards sets. Rarer materials are now shown as the default Rewards Set Option A, but you can switch to the other rewards set as needed.

· Optimized how file icons are displayed in [Archive - Nexus Files].

· Optimized the tab display order in [Acquisition Center - Dijiang Select].

· Optimized certain aspects of [OMV Dijiang]. Loading speed will be increased when consecutively visiting a friend's [OMV Dijiang]. The duration of clue exchanges in the [Reception Room] has been shortened from 24 hours to 20 hours. The [Clue Library] screen will also feature markers that distinguish clues you collected from those received from friends. Cabin upgrades can also be performed remotely via the [Control Nexus].

· Optimized certain data checks during the preloading phase to enhance game stability.

· Optimized how certain red dot notifications are displayed.

· Optimized button display on certain screens when playing with a controller.

· PlayStation®5 Pro now supports the upgraded PSSR, further enhancing image quality and clarity.

· The PC version now supports the following settings:

○ NVIDIA DLSS 4.5 Super Resolution. When enabled, on-screen details will appear sharper and clearer, while maintaining stable frame rates even in complex scenes.

○ Added support for AMD FSR 3, offering FSR 3 super resolution mode and frame generation options on compatible hardware.

· Optimized the visual quality of operators in rainy environments on PC and PlayStation®5, with more realistic raindrop buildup, wetness effects, and other visual details.

· Optimized the visual effects for opening Sealed Protocol Crates.

■ Others

· Optimized the game client's storage usage. This update will consolidate and optimize game resources, reduce the client size, and free up device storage space.

· The amount of [Pass EXP] granted immediately upon unlocking [Protocol Customized] in the [Protocol Pass] has been increased to 12,500. After this adjustment, the unlock order of [Originium Supply] and [Protocol Customized] will no longer affect the amount of [Pass EXP] granted immediately upon unlocking [Protocol Customized].

· Optimized the look of 6★ operator [Mi Fu]'s skirt in certain scenes.

· Optimized the display logic for reward previews on the [Operational Manual - Index - Operator Progression] page.

· Optimized the overall presentation of ambient NPCs across all scenes.

· Optimized the visual effects of certain weapon VFX.

· Optimized the appearance of distant trees in certain areas.

· Optimized the display, visual effects, and interactions on certain screens.

· Optimized the atmosphere in certain scenes.

· Optimized the description text explaining how to obtain certain [Engraved Medals] and how to apply [Trim].

· Optimized how players participate in the [Protocol Reconnection] return event.

· Optimized the text descriptions for certain missions.

▼// Bug Fixes

■ Missions

· Fixed an issue where the special effects for the NPC [Mysterious Illusion] would be missing in the side mission [Let Fire Consume the Ashen Past] under specific circumstances.

· Fixed an issue where bats would appear with incorrect colors in certain scenes during the side mission [Danse Macabre].

· Fixed an issue where gates would incorrectly display in certain scenes during the main mission [Chapter Ⅱ Process Ⅲ: Purity Reveals the Stubborn Stone].

· Fixed an issue where certain NPCs or operators would incorrectly display during missions under specific circumstances.

· Fixed an issue where mission details would not open properly after selecting a mission marker on the map under specific circumstances.

■ Combat

· Fixed an issue where 6★ operator [Camille]'s wings would sometimes incorrectly display during screen transitions from the Overview screen.

· Fixed an issue where 5★ operator [Alesh] could not trigger certain weapon skill effects with his battle skill after unlocking the potential [Super Salty Comeback].

· Fixed an issue where the game screen would abnormally rotate when the 5★ operator [Snowshine] is set as the controlled operator and certain actions are performed.

· Fixed an issue where abnormal camera shaking would sometimes occur when 4★ operator [Catcher] was on the team and performed a Final Strike.

· Fixed an issue where performing certain actions during some [Protocol Space] challenges had a chance of causing abnormal game progression.

· Fixed an issue where under certain circumstances, the enemy [Tidewalker δ]'s model would abnormally jitter when hit by attacks.

· Fixed an issue where dive attacks performed by 6★ operator [Zhuang Fangyi] lacked vibration feedback on mobile devices.

■ Voice Languages and Sound Effects

· Fixed an issue where some story voice lines were cut off when the game language was set to English.

■ Events & Gameplay

· Fixed an issue in [Trial of Swordmancy] where the results screen displayed incorrect text when the Battle Points for the last Rewarded Trial were 0.

· Fixed an issue in [Athletic Race] where the gameplay countdown would abnormally fail to display after hot-swapping to a controller.

■ System

· Fixed an issue where hot-swapping to a controller after using [Detectors] and selecting the corresponding marker would cause the item animation to play repeatedly.

· Fixed an issue where the [Mute When Window Is Inactive] feature in Settings would sometimes fail to work properly.

· Fixed an issue where the character limit prompt would not appear when renaming a team after certain actions.

· Fixed an issue where under certain circumstances, operators would enter an abnormal state after moving to a specific location in [Wuling - Sword Vault Dale - South Gorge Rampart].

· Fixed an issue where the tracking button text for certain map markers would display abnormally when playing with a controller.

· Fixed an issue where performing certain actions after opening the map with a controller would cause it to display incorrectly.

· Fixed an issue where certain buttons in [Baker] would fail to respond under certain circumstances when playing with a controller.

· Fixed an issue where under certain operations on mobile devices, the map could abnormally be moved after selecting a marker.

· Fixed an issue on PlayStation®5 that allowed team names to exceed the character limit.

· Fixed an issue where under certain circumstances, there was a chance of abnormal flickering in parts of the map screen when opening [Protosync] on PlayStation®5.

■ Others

· Fixed an issue where certain visuals would display incorrectly under specific circumstances.

· Fixed an issue where certain glow effects would display abnormally.

· Fixed an issue where certain icons would display abnormally.

· Fixed an issue in [Wuling - Test Area] where sewage in certain pools would display incorrectly after extraction under specific circumstances.

list.title: Risk Warning
list.header: Security Risk Warning for Using Unofficial Tools

data.html:
Authorizing account login on third-party websites or tools carries security risks, such as the leakage of account information or misuse of data. To ensure your account security, we remind all players to note the following:

1. Do not authorize account login on any third-party platforms from unknown sources or lacking official certification.

2. Avoid entering account information or completing authorization on unofficial pages, as this may lead to risks such as information leakage or abnormal login activity.

3. Be sure to log in to the game and related service pages only through official channels, and exercise caution to avoid clicking links from unknown sources.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. Let's work together to maintain a safe and orderly gaming environment.

list.title: Account Security Reminder
list.header: Gryphline Account Security Device Verification Is Now Live

data.html:
Dear Endministrator,

To further enhance the security of your Gryphline Account and safeguard your account and game assets, a [Security Device Verification] feature has been added to the account system.
Players can enable [New Device Login Verification] in the Account Center. Once enabled:
- The system will display a list of devices previously used to log in to the account;
- You can manage your logged-in devices and remove any device;
- When logging in on a removed or a new device, you must enter a verification code sent to your linked email to complete identity verification before you can successfully log in.

How to enable:
PC: Settings → Account Center → Security Settings → Manage Device
Mobile: Settings → Account Center → Manage Game → Manage Device

We recommend all players enable this feature as soon as possible to enhance account security.
Please safeguard your account information. Do not log in through unofficial channels or share your password on any third-party platform (including top-up, power-leveling, or account trading services) to avoid security risks.
Thank you for your understanding and support.

Thank you for your continued interest and support for Arknights: Endfield. To maintain a healthy and fair gaming environment and protect the legitimate rights and interests of all players, we would like to remind everyone of the following:

1. The use of cheats, third-party tools, unauthorized top-ups, or any other improper methods that disrupt the game's integrity or violate the Game Terms of Service is strictly prohibited. Based on backend monitoring and player reports, if such violations are confirmed, we will take appropriate action depending on the severity of the offense, including but not limited to the removal of illicit gains, temporary suspension, or permanent account bans.

2. To protect the legitimate rights and interests of all players, please do not transfer, share, or trade your game account. Any consequences resulting from such actions, including account theft or loss of in-game assets, shall be borne by the player.

3. To ensure a complete gameplay experience, players are strictly prohibited from unpacking, modifying, or tampering with the game installation files, as well as distributing related extracted materials.

Finally, creating a positive and fair gaming environment requires the collective efforts of all players. We kindly ask everyone to help maintain a fair and orderly gaming environment. If you come across any violations, please feel free to report them through our official customer service center.

list.title: Feature Usage Policy
list.header: Automated Industry Complex & Blueprint Usage Policy

data.html:
To ensure a friendly gaming environment, please follow our Terms of Service when using features related to the Automated Industry Complex. Please do not post or engage in content that involves:

1. Discrimination based on region, race, sexual orientation, religion, politics, etc.

2. Defamation, offense, or infringement of others' rights

3. Obscenity, violence, gambling, or hate

4. Anything prohibited or deemed inappropriate by the Terms of Service

If you engage in any of the above violations, penalties may be applied, including removal of items placed in the Automated Industry Complex, restrictions on AIC Factory features, and account suspension. To report violations, use the [Report] button or contact customer support.

If you use the [Share Blueprint] feature, you will get a [Blueprint Code] that lets other Endministrators view and use your [Blueprint]. Before getting started, please note: by sharing your [Blueprint Code], you're allowing anyone to view, copy, or use your design. Please consider carefully before sharing.
